name: Francine "Frankie" Wallace
description:
Francine "Frankie" Wallace is a Jellicle (an anthro bunny with other animal features) who is very interested in weirdcore and 30s inspired stuff.

Birthday: August 28, 1998

Age: 27

Pronouns: She/Her

Birthplace: Liverpool, UK 🇬🇧

Personality: mostly quiet, likes drawing, enjoys 30s stuff/aesthetic and weirdcore, 80s fan.

Likes: Gorillaz, The Real Tuesday Weld, Fleetwood Mac, Daft Punk, Cuphead, etc.

Dislikes: Pollen (allergic), heights (acrophobia), missing events, annoying people, being used.

Can be used for NSFW. Your choice.
